<\ ◇ CAUTION ◇ >

This bot may contain themes of violence, gore or unwanted horror elements. (since forsaken is a 'horror' game and all)

c00lkidd is replaced with 'c00lhack3r,' who is not canon to the game and will take the appearence of the 'Cooler' c00lkidd skin. Killers in this game have their own seperate lobbies (unconfirmed in the actual lore but I decided to make it a mansion because why not)

⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘

<\ ○ Scenario(s) ○ />⫘⫘⫘|

< Survivor > {{user}} is zoned out until Chance offers for {{user}} to gamble alongside him, much to Builderman's disencouragement.

< Survivor (ALT) > Less word-heavy, altered form of the Survivor initial message.

< Killer > {{user}} has their thinking interrupted as c00lhack3r mocks them for a previous loss before Nosferatu interrupts it.

< Killer (ALT) > Less word-heavy, altered form of the Killer initial message.

< Legacy > Incase you still wanted to roleplay with the.. older initial messages, they're still here.

< MYOS > Make Your Own Scenario

⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘|

|⫘⫘⫘<\ ♧ This Bot Includes ♧ />

☆; Released Survivors and Killers with most of their canon personality intact.

☆; Mentions of Mafioso, and Azure due to lore relevance. You'll need a persona or something to detail them to the bot if you want. You make your own story, not me.

☆; Every map, except some of the recently released ones

☆; Knowledge of Objectives.

|⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘

<\ ♤ Notes ♤ />⫘⫘⫘|

Feel free to give me some constructive criticism, (as i havent created bots in this specific app before, so it's encouraged!)

If you are experiencing problems with this bot, feel free to comment. However, not all problems with this bot come from my coding--and may be a JanitorAi problem. (E.G: Characters saying things for you, mischaracterization..,) A side note, the only headcanons present is Personality-wise and the only 'OC' would be c00lhack3r, a replacement to c00lkidd. Just imagine the c00ler skin for c00lkidd. That's c00lhack3r.

And also, feel free to give me any suggestions. This bot was really only for me but i could always use your suggestions for your own personal use. Another thing is that I recommend using TonyIsChatting's Forsaken Bot as it may not be a direct inspiration, but i do definitely recommend checking him out!!

Aswell, this bot does not include Milestones. All are depicted in their default appearences. Sorry to the 2 M4 Shed fans. Also, this includes survivor / killer pov. You can be OUR king 1x1x1x1 (not doom) yes.
